title: Step 3: Add a root for shared layout content

content.text: Create a separate root for content used by app/layout.tsx, such as header and footer text.

body.code:
app/
├ page.tsx
╰ layout.tsx

entries/
├ landing/
│ ├ LandingPage.tsx
│ ╰ LandingPage.schema.tsx
╰ settings/
  ├ SiteLayout.tsx
  ╰ SiteLayout.schema.tsx

blocks/
├ text/
│ ├ TextBlock.tsx
│ ╰ TextBlock.schema.tsx
├ image/
│ ├ ImageBlock.tsx
│ ╰ ImageBlock.schema.tsx
╰ gallery/
  ├ GalleryBlock.tsx
  ╰ GalleryBlock.schema.tsx

cms.tsx

content.text: Define a dedicated entry type for shared layout content used site-wide.
Create small header/footer components and infer their props from the SiteLayout schema.
Register SiteLayout in a dedicated globals root and seed one settings entry.
Use the SiteLayout type in app/layout.tsx so the fetched settings entry is inferred correctly.
